payload.description: ADA station improvements at three Metro-North Harlem Line stations in the Bronx: Botanical Garden, Williams Bridge and Woodlawn. Botanical Garden is a state of good repair project; Williams Bridge and Woodlawn are complete station replacements with ADA access.

payload.description: Purchase of 250 over-the-road express diesel buses from Prevost Car (US) Inc. for MTA Bus Company, replacing aging buses operating out of MTABC depots in the Bronx and Queens

payload.description: OCIP insurance cost secured at 4.53% of construction value netting $210-$295 million savings to MTA based on a range of 7-8% for contractor's insurance

tool_args.label: S&P Upgrades TRBs to A- from BBB+

payload.claim_text: On October 3, 2023, S&P Global Ratings upgraded its ratings on the Transportation Revenue Bonds (TRBs) to A- from BBB+ and revised its outlook to positive.

payload.claim_text: On September 19, 2023, Moody's improved rating outlook on the TRBs from stable to positive and affirmed their rating of A3.
